items.title: Geist Sans font is declared but never loaded
items.intent: The body font (Geist Sans) must actually load and render. Currently global.css declares it in @theme but no font file or stylesheet is imported — every page silently falls back to system-ui.
steps: Determine loading strategy: Google Fonts, Fontsource, or self-hosted woff2
Add font import/link so Geist Sans loads on all pages
Verify the font renders in browser devtools

acceptanceCriteria.text: Geist Sans font files are loaded by the browser
